summary: Excellent front‑of‑house style recording capturing a hot second‑set opener and a phenomenal Space > The Other One
review: The reviewer, who attended the concert, raves that the tape sounds like you’re standing right at the front of house – clear and immersive. They highlight an unusually fiery MSWS opening set 2 and a space‑to‑Other One sequence that was “truly phenomenal for the ’80s.” The overall vibe is overwhelmingly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Single five‑star review praises both performance and recording; high marks on show quality and excellent‑sounding source, but limited data lowers confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as sounding like standing front of house – clear, immersive, no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set opened with a surprisingly hot MSWS and flowed into an outstanding Space > The Other One, noted as a highlight of the night.
